claim_bullets.bullet_text: A vampire bat is a giant bloodsucking bat with a wingspan of about 2 meters, preferring to suck the blood of living creatures rather than eat their meat. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.203-206)
A giant bat is a massive bat, with a wingspan of 3 meters across, completely nocturnal, flying around forests and wastelands to hunt at night. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.203-206)

Grizzlies are generally solitary, except when a mother bear is with her cubs, and are omnivores said to eat anything they can fit into their mouths. (raw/Sword World RPG - Complete Edition.pdf p.203-206)

source_record_text: This section describes various animals and monsters found in the Sword World RPG setting, including vampire bats, giant bats, bears, lions, giant slugs, toads, ants, apes, and giant antlions.
